response.justification: Strong individual contributor with 19 years of diverse engineering experience, but lacks critical CTO competencies. No demonstrated track record scaling engineering teams from 10-30+ people, production multi-agent AI system architecture experience, or fintech infrastructure knowledge. Recent MCP/agentic exposure (April 2025) shows interest but is too nascent and narrow to evidence the depth required for this executive AI-fintech leadership role.
strengths: Broad full-stack engineering across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems with 19 years total experience
Hands-on distributed systems expertise at scale: Dunnhumby's millions of HTTP requests/second, low-latency systems, microservices
Staff-level technical roles with recent exposure to agentic AI frameworks and MCP code generators
concerns: No demonstrated experience building or scaling engineering teams from 10-30+ people—critical gap for CTO role requiring organizational leadership

Minimal production multi-agent AI system architecture or operation; recent MCP exposure (April 2025) insufficient to evidence required depth in agentic frameworks, LLM evaluation, or production failure modes
Only one year of fintech experience (RIDE Capital, 2020–2021); lacks the algorithmic working-capital, credit-risk, and regulated-environment knowledge fintech CTO role demands

key_factors.factor: Team scaling and organizational leadership track record
Production multi-agent AI system design and operation
